title: Handoff Checkpoint Chip
prompt:
Create a production-ready Handoff Checkpoint Chip using TypeScript React, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion. This original miscellaneous control records whether a compact handoff checklist has been acknowledged. The chip starts as Waiting for owner with a small numbered checkpoint; activation changes it to Owner confirmed and adds one concise explanatory row. Use a light Bento composition with white surfaces, #F4F5F6 background, 22px panel corners, #ECECEE borders, soft shadow, #111111 headings, and #4A4A4F support copy. Use emerald for confirmed and lemon for waiting; no gradients on the card.

Implement a single semantic 44px button with aria-pressed and a label that describes the next action. Click, Enter, and Space must toggle it. Move the compact checkpoint badge with a stiffness 360, damping 26 spring and fade the explanatory copy over 150ms ease-out. Use a polite live region so screen readers receive the new status. The status must be distinguished by words and icon as well as color. Keep state local, do not use timers, random values, storage, network requests, remote images, or dynamic code.

The chip must work in a tight preview at 320px while remaining useful in a wide detail preview. Preserve visible keyboard focus, logical tab order, semantic heading structure, and AA contrast. Respect prefers-reduced-motion by snapping the badge to its final position and limiting changes to a brief opacity fade. Return complete client component code followed by runnable pure CSS with suggested HTML.

code.css:
/* HTML: <button class="handoff-checkpoint" aria-pressed="false">1 · Waiting for owner</button> */
.handoff-checkpoint{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;min-height:48px;padding:0 16px;border:0;border-radius:16px;background:#fff9ce;color:#111;font-weight:900}.handoff-checkpoint[aria-pressed=true]{background:#e5fbf2}.handoff-checkpoint::after{width:12px;height:12px;border-radius:50%;background:#f5e642;content:""}.handoff-checkpoint[aria-pressed=true]::after{background:#10b981}.handoff-checkpoint:focus-visible{outline:3px solid #111;outline-offset:4px}@media(prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){.handoff-checkpoint *{transition:none}}

demoCode:
(() => {function Demo(){const [ok,setOk]=React.useState(false);return
HANDOFF CHECKPOINT

{ok?'The next owner can begin their review.':'Select the chip when the owner accepts the handoff.'}

}return ;})()
